headline: Invesco QEW ETF Targets Nasdaq 100 Concentration Risk And Growth Story
summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) has launched the Invesco QQQ Equal Weight ETF (QEW), expanding its QQQ Innovation Suite. The new ETF offers exposure to Nasdaq-100 companies using an equal-weight approach that aims to reduce concentration risk. This product adds another option for investors seeking systematic access to large US growth and technology oriented names. Invesco is adding QEW at a time when its own shares trade around $23.42, with a mixed return profile. The stock shows a 56.6% return over 1...

headline: ‘Say thank you and get out’: Why one top strategist says to dump Magnificent 7 stocks now
